description: A classic Flappy Bird game where players navigate a bird through randomly generated pipe obstacles to earn points.
aiUsage: AI was used to create the physics engine for gravity and collision detection, design the game mechanics for pipe generation, and optimize the score tracking and leaderboard systems.
credits: Game Concept: Flappy Bird (inspired by the original)
Frontend: HTML5 Canvas with CSS3 styling
Backend: PHP with JSON data persistence
